title: System 1 System 2
script_summary: A concise explanation of System 1 and System 2 thinking, highlighting their differences and implications.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about System 1 and System 2 than you might think.
System 1 is your brain's fast, automatic thinking. Think instinctive reactions.
But here’s the twist: System 2 is slower, more deliberate. It's where analysis happens.
Imagine making a snap judgment versus solving a complex problem. That's the difference.
Studies show we rely on System 1 most of the time, but when stakes are high, System 2 kicks in.
Understanding this can transform how you approach decisions, from everyday choices to life-changing ones.
Want to unlock the power of your mind? Like and follow for more insights!
